title: Breach Candy Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Breach Candy Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
